comments.author: @rudolphfung
comments.text: I was born in this beautiful place. Love ❤️

comments.author: @CollinHouston-n8o6g
comments.text: And we still need More for the people

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@CollinHouston-n8o6g 
Thank you for your comment. You're absolutely right—there is still a lot of progress and support needed for the community. We hope this documentary helps raise more awareness for them.

comments.author: @charissawilson9949
comments.text: You speak of Guyanese liming but you are showing whites in pubs.

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text: @charissawilson9949 Thank you for your feedback. We always strive to show the diverse faces and cultures of the places we visit. We'll definitely keep your perspective in mind for future videos!

comments.author: @ikejoseph-q1r
comments.text: What a small island with great potentials

replies.author: @richlisola1
replies.text: It is not an island.  Are you dense?  Not all Caribbean lands are islands.  Belize, Guyana, Suriname, and French Guyana are all Caribbean countries and lands, that are found on the mainlands of North America and South America.

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@ikejoseph-q1r
Thank you for your comment! Actually, Guyana is located on the mainland of South America, though it shares a strong culture with the Caribbean. You are absolutely right—it is a hidden gem with incredible potential!

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@annp7988 
Thank you so much! We’re thrilled that you enjoyed the documentary. We put a lot of effort into capturing the authentic life in Guyana, so your support means a lot to us!

comments.author: @Jyopeshight12_3
comments.text: Ahhh Guyana is on the Map..😂😂😂😂

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@Jyopeshight12_3 
Haha, very true! Physically it's there, but we used that phrase because it's such a hidden gem that many travelers still overlook. Thanks for watching and for the support!

comments.author: @jonnelbabb2390
comments.text:
Thank you so much for putting such a well documented video of our beautiful Guyana. 
The best so far it must have take a lot off hard work to put this documentary together.Well well done thank you ❤💯🇬🇾

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@jonnelbabb2390
Thank you so much for your kind words! We are thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the documentary. Guyana is truly a hidden gem with such beautiful people and culture, and it was a privilege for us to capture its story. Your support makes all the hard work worth it!

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@juliusmcbean1611
Thank you so much! I’m glad the way we shared Guyana's story resonated with you. Stay tuned for more documentaries!

comments.author: @lawrencesonyah7782
comments.text: They discovered oil, and they are not far from the US 😂😂😂😂?

replies.author: @vze4vjxt
replies.text: you are right 😀😀😀😀😀 exxon made over 684 Billion we got 2% after expenses

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@lawrencesonyah7782 
Exactly! The recent oil discovery is definitely putting Guyana in the global spotlight and shifting the region's dynamics. It's a fascinating time to observe how the country evolves. Thanks for watching!

replies.author: @ThePlanetJournalGlobe
replies.text:
@ganeshsookram4287
Thank you so much! I'm glad you enjoyed the depth of our coverage on Guyana. We put a lot of effort into capturing the authentic side of life there.
